name: Ham and Cheese Calzone
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Yellow and green pepper, chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Coat a small skillet with cooking spray. Heat over medium heat until hot.
Add peppers, mushrooms, and garlic; cook until soft.
Make slits in the pita. Fill with pepper mixture, ham, Jarlsberg, and parsley. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese; season with black pepper to taste.
Wrap in foil. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
